message:
test(stress): add comprehensive stress tests and load simulators for extreme pressure scenarios

- Add 1258-line stress test suite exercising EWMA, PID, policy engine,
  guardrails, ballast manager, and self-monitor under synthetic pressure traces
- Include stress report infrastructure with scenario naming, duration,
  sample counts, and assertion tracking
- Cover extreme pressure scenarios: burst growth, sustained high load,
  oscillating pressure, and recovery paths (bd-3sb)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
